name: Banana Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 4 cups French or Sourdough bread, day-old; cubed (1-inch pieces)
1 cup Bananas, firm, sliced into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bread cubes in a greased 2-quart casserole dish and pour butter over them, tossing to coat.
2. In a medium bowl, lightly beat eggs; add milk, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt. Stir in bananas.
3. Pour the mixture over the bread cubes and stir to coat evenly.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 40 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Meanwhile, make the sauce: melt butter in a small saucepan.
6. Combine sugar and cornstarch; add to butter.
7. Stir in milk and corn syrup.
8. Cook over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full boil.
9. Boil for 1 minute.
10. Remove from the heat; stir in vanilla.
11. Serve warm sauce over warm pudding.
